input_text: Elephants, foxes and rabbits are nice animals and good toys. Cities in Estonia are estonian. Penguins happily live in water. If X1 is a grandfather of Y1, Y1 is not a child of X1. John is in the box. Mike is cool. The guide offered the tourists tea. A kitchen door was open. The length of Nile is 80 kilometers. The red square has a nail. Mary journeyed to the bathroom. Eve sent Tom a long letter. A coffee cup broke. A blue square has a hole. The student carrying the books greeted the teacher. Anna handed Mark a silver key. Tallinn is hardly in Latvia. The picture was painted by Leo. A red square has a hole?
